revision.comment: Current practice seems to be to delete empty past months' categories as soon as the month has passed, so adjust the auto-g6 logic to match: tag starting when the month has ended ([[Anywhere on Earth]], so UTC-noon on the 1st), and continue to tag cats for more than 1 month in the future too
1 revision imported: second run of importing xml edited files to get rid of the bad category
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 7 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Cat]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
